reforms.description: The government promoted an industrial policy aimed at improving the general conditions conducive to efficiency and innovation rather than relying on direct selective support.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the overall conditions for efficiency and innovation, the policy aims to stimulate economic growth and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: Measures have been taken in virtually all the fields mentioned above although to varying degrees.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift towards a more holistic approach to industrial policy, focusing on systemic improvements rather than targeted support.
reforms.source_quote: Promotion of an industrial policy aimed at improving the general conditions conducive to improved efficiency and innovation rather than relying on direct selective support.
